overall.description: A atmospheric first-person walk through a foggy, gas-lit historic district at night, rendered in a video game engine (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2). The camera pans to reveal a hitched horse before proceeding down wet cobblestone streets with tram tracks, passing wooden carts and balconied buildings, until a horse crosses the path near a stop sign.

The wet cobblestones reflect the warm glow of gas lamps as the camera begins moving forward past wooden carts and balconied buildings.

segments.scene_description: Moving forward along the tram tracks, the camera passes the Schiffer building and horse, continuing down the misty cobblestone street. A brief motion blur occurs as the camera advances toward an arched building in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along the tram tracks flanked by rows of commercial buildings. A barrel cart and stop sign gradually approach on the right side as the camera moves steadily forward through the foggy, lamp-lit street.

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches an intersection, a horse suddenly gallops across the street from left to right. The camera continues past a barrel cart and stop sign on the right, approaching a distinctive white building with a steep roof in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a foggy, gas-lit historic district that transitions from a quiet street corner to a bustling intersection. It begins with a pan to the right to reveal a hitched horse outside the Schiffer building, where wet cobblestones reflect the warm glow of lamps as the camera starts moving forward past wooden carts and balconied structures. As the camera advances along the tram tracks, the mist thickens slightly and a brief motion blur occurs while heading toward a distant arched building. The scene then expands along rows of commercial buildings, steadily approaching a barrel cart and a stop sign on the right. Finally, as the camera reaches an intersection, a horse gallops across the path from left to right before the view settles on a distinctive white building with a steep roof in the distance.
